since_last: 83% of 99 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 83% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.60% · Gold +1.52% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 83% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.19%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.19%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.51%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.51%, HPE +10.19%, CEVA +6.89%, TLN +6.61%, LRCX +6.53%. Laggards: AVAV -5.79%, IBM -2.67%, PLTR -2.64%, CRM -2.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.77% at $152.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
